The property is west facing and overlooks landscaped amenities including the swimming pool and garden areas, creating a pleasant residential ambience.::::The apartment features a combined living and dining layout that enhances openness and functionality. The township is planned with open spaces and greenery to create a balanced and refreshing residential environment.::::Locality::::Strategically located on Sarjapur Road, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to major IT corridors including Electronic City, Outer Ring Road, Whitefield, and Marathahalli. Multiple reputed schools, hospitals, shopping centres, and daily conveniences are located within approximately 10 km of the project. The area also benefits from upcoming metro connectivity planned nearby, which is expected to further enhance accessibility across Bangalore.
